docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$160.00) SERVED SEP-11-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, ED DBA ODETOKYO
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY REALIN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, ED DBA ODETOKYO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40. FILED BY PLAINTIFF REALIN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, ED DBA ODETOKYO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DANIEL REALIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ED KIM IS NOT PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF HAS FILED HIS CLAIM AGAINST THE WRONG DEFENDANT. THE PROPER DEFENDANT IS WINES OF HER LLC DBA ODETOKYO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-08-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL REALIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ED KIM DBA ODETOKYO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY REALIN, DANIEL
